ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game configuration */,
  "initial_lane_type" INTEGER /* Type of initial lane setup (e.g., straight, curved) */,
  "enable_half_gate" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether half gates are enabled */,
  "horse_num_gate_variation" INTEGER /* Variation in the number of horses at the starting gate */,
  "turf_vision_type" INTEGER /* Type of turf vision (e.g., normal, enhanced) */,
  "footsmoke_color_type" INTEGER /* Color type for footsmoke (e.g., default, custom) */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the race track in meters */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions for the race (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "special_effects" TEXT /* Special effects to be used in the race (e.g., fireworks, fog) */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the race (1-5) */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the race */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the race */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the player */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of the player's last active session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the player's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the player's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player profile */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's avatar image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the player */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* JSON object containing player achievements */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object containing player preferences */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the player in the game */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points of the player */,
  "total_races" INTEGER /* Total number of races the player has participated in */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of races the player has won */,
  "favorite_track" TEXT /* Name of the player's favorite track */,
  "favorite_horse" TEXT /* Name of the player's favorite horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date when the race is scheduled */,
  "race_time" TEXT /* Time when the race is scheduled */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of the race (e.g., sprint, endurance) */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game configuration used for the race */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the race */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the race */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the race */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the race */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions for the race (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the race track in meters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES game_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the horse used by the player */,
  "entry_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player entered the race */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the entry (e.g., pending, confirmed, withdrawn) */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount of virtual currency bet by the player */,
  "bet_on_horse" INTEGER /* Reference to the horse the player bet on */,
  "bet_multiplier" REAL /* Multiplier for the bet */,
  "entry_fee_paid" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the entry fee has been paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., in-game currency, real money) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the horse */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed rating of the horse */,
  "stamina" REAL /* Stamina rating of the horse */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who owns the horse */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the horse */,
  "training_level" INTEGER /* Training level of the horse */,
  "last_race" TEXT /* Last race the horse participated in */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of races the horse has won */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the horse was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the horse was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race entry */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position of the player in the race */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the race */,
  "final_speed" REAL /* Final speed of the horse */,
  "final_stamina" REAL /* Final stamina of the horse */,
  "weather_impact" TEXT /* Impact of weather conditions on the race */,
  "track_conditions" TEXT /* Impact of track conditions on the race */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES race_entries ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position of the player in the race */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player in the race */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the player */,
  "total_races" INTEGER /* Total number of races the player has participated in */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of races the player has won */,
  "average_position" REAL /* Average position of the player in races */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., purchase, reward) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "transaction_method" TEXT /* Method of transaction (e.g., in-game currency, real money) */,
  "payment_provider" TEXT /* Payment provider used (e.g., PayPal, Stripe) */,
  "transaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the transaction (e.g., order ID, transaction ID) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
